evals.prompt: 이력서 만들어줘. PDF로 한 장짜리 깔끔한 거.
evals.expected_output: 1-page A4 PDF rendered with the founder-portfolio skill, default style (swiss-pure). File saved to cwd or a sensible default location, opened in Preview.

assertions.text: Skill founder-portfolio was invoked (not resume-builder, not weekly-pdf)
Output is a single PDF file
PDF size > 1 MB (indicates photo and seal embedded successfully)
render.py was called with --style swiss-pure (or no --style, defaulting to swiss-pure)

evals.prompt: 내 founder portfolio 5가지 스타일 다 뽑아줘. 데스크탑에 저장하고. 각각 PDF로.
evals.expected_output: Five PDFs, one per Swiss variant (pure / red / cream / navy / seal), saved to ~/Desktop/, each ~2-3 MB, all opened or listed.

assertions.text: Filenames contain swiss-pure, swiss-red, swiss-cream, swiss-navy, swiss-seal substrings respectively
All 5 PDFs are saved under ~/Desktop/ (or the user-specified output dir)
Each PDF is between 1.5 MB and 5 MB

evals.prompt: 정상록 프로필 PDF 만들어줘 — 빨간색 액센트 들어간 걸로. 카카오 미팅에 가져가게.
evals.expected_output: Single PDF in swiss-red style (red hairline accent), opened in Preview. Should NOT be swiss-seal (that's vermilion 朱印, different aesthetic).

assertions.text: Style chosen is swiss-red specifically (not swiss-seal, not swiss-pure)

evals.prompt: Reactive Resume에 올릴 ATS 친화적인 일반 resume JSON 만들어줘.
evals.expected_output: This should NOT trigger founder-portfolio. It should route to resume-builder skill (which handles Reactive Resume schema). founder-portfolio is for editorial 1-page PDFs, not ATS JSON.

assertions.text: resume-builder skill was invoked instead, OR the model explained it was deferring to that skill

evals.prompt: 지난주 KPI 보고서 PDF 뽑아줘 매출이랑 미팅이랑 정리해서.
evals.expected_output: This should NOT trigger founder-portfolio. It should route to weekly-pdf skill. founder-portfolio is for personal/founder profiles, not weekly business KPI rollups.

assertions.text: weekly-pdf skill was invoked instead, OR the model identified weekly-pdf as the right tool
